rationale: Trump's Iran deal claim and cancelled strikes are a significant domestic policy development with market implications; stock surge is directly felt by US residents, but deal remains unconfirmed.

top_events.title: Trump cancels Iran strikes, touts peace deal; markets surge
top_events.summary: Trump claims Iran deal 'approved' and called off military strikes; stock markets surged. Direct financial impact on US residents' portfolios and potential oil price relief, though Iran says nothing finalized.

top_events.title: Hegseth warns Cuba against acquiring weapons at Guantánamo
top_events.summary: US Defense Secretary visits Guantánamo and issues warning to Cuba; active US military posture in the Caribbean, relevant to domestic policy watchers.

top_events.title: Canadian mother sues OpenAI over daughter's suicide
top_events.summary: Lawsuit alleging ChatGPT contributed to a teenager's death; raises AI safety and liability questions relevant to US tech policy and public debate.
